sub: Six things every agency owner wants to know before bringing us into a client relationship.

items.question: Can I trust you with my clients?
items.answer: Your reputation rides on the work. We get it. We sign mutual NDAs, work invisibly under your brand if you want, and never communicate with your clients without you in the loop. Every project has a single point of contact on our side.

items.question: Is this worth it vs. cheap freelancers?
items.answer: Reliability has a cost, and missed deadlines have a bigger one. Our pricing buys predictable delivery, transparent timelines, and one team that doesn't ghost you mid-project. We don't compete on hourly rate. We replace the cost of a hire.

items.question: What if the quality isn't good enough?
items.answer: Every project ships through internal QA before it touches your client. Weekly demos, written feedback, iteration until you sign off. If something isn't right, we fix it. That's the deal.

items.question: Will you understand my niche?
items.answer: We work with agencies serving local businesses and SMBs. That's the lane. The discovery call is where we map your client's voice, vertical, and ICP. If we're not the right fit, we'll tell you on that call.

items.question: What's the turnaround time?
items.answer: Proposal in your inbox within 24 hours of the discovery call. Project kickoff inside one week. Most retainers run on weekly demos with same-day Slack response during business hours.

items.question: Am I too small to work with you?
items.answer: If you have one client, you're the right size. Half our partners are solopreneurs scaling their first roster. The model works whether you're at $0/mo or $100k/mo MRR.
